mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CD_SEQNO ASC) AS LINE_NO , ORG_ID , UP_CD , CD , CDNM , CD_VL , CD_SEQNO , CD_EXPLN , USEYN , RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL WHERE USER_PRFIL_ID = RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL WHERE USER_PRFIL_ID = MDFR_ID) AS MOD_NM , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD A WHERE 1 = 1

sql.if: AND ( LOWER(CD) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(CDNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )

mapper.select: /* SQL ID : orgCodeDAO.list 설 명 : 리스트 */
/* SQL ID : OrgCodeDAO.listPageing 설 명 : 코드의 페이징 목록 */
/* SQL ID : OrgCodeDAO.selectKey 설 명 : 키를 가져옴 */ SELECT #{upCd}||LPAD(SQ_ORG_CODE.nextVal,6,'0') AS CD
